---
title: "Trapping Data Verification Report"
subtitle: "`r basename(params$csv_path)`"
params:
  csv_path: "raw_data/survey_data/trapping_data_2026_onwards/adelaide_plains/13_03_26.csv"
  site_info_path: null
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false

# path to the CSV to verify — passed as a parameter when rendered via targets pipeline
path <- params$csv_path

# Load required packages
library(dplyr)
library(leaflet)
library(sf)
library(lubridate)
library(readr)
library(knitr)

# Load data
data <- read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Parse date columns (stored as d/m/Y character strings in the CSVs)
date_cols <- c("session_start_date", "session_end_date", "date")
for (col in date_cols) {
  if (col %in% names(data) && is.character(data[[col]])) {
    data[[col]] <- lubridate::dmy(data[[col]])
  }
}

# Initialize error tracking
validation_errors <- list()
validation_passed <- TRUE
```

## Survey Information

**Data file:** `r basename(path)`
**Report generated:** `r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')`
**Number of records:** `r nrow(data)`

---

# Data Validation Checks {.tabset}

```{r checks-setup}
# Expected columns and their required R class after read_csv() + date parsing
expected_cols <- c(
  "data_source",
  "region", "farmer", "site", "subsite",
  "longitude", "latitude",
  "session_start_date", "session_end_date",
  "crop_type", "crop_stage", "ground_cover_percent", "biomass",
  "date", "survey_night", "trap_type",
  "number_traps_set", "number_phantoms", "number_functional_traps", "number_mice_caught",
  "grid_location_x", "grid_location_y",
  "pit_tag_id", "class", "sex", "vagina", "teats", "pregnant",
  "weight_g", "length_mm", "fate"
)

expected_classes <- list(
  longitude                = "numeric",
  latitude                 = "numeric",
  session_start_date       = "Date",
  session_end_date         = "Date",
  date                     = "Date",
  survey_night             = "numeric",
  ground_cover_percent     = "numeric",
  number_traps_set         = "numeric",
  number_phantoms          = "numeric",
  number_functional_traps  = "numeric",
  number_mice_caught       = "numeric",
  grid_location_x          = "numeric",
  grid_location_y          = "numeric",
  weight_g                 = "numeric",
  length_mm                = "numeric"
)
```

## Column Structure

```{r check-columns}
missing_cols <- setdiff(expected_cols, names(data))
extra_cols   <- setdiff(names(data), expected_cols)

if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  validation_errors <- c(validation_errors,
                         list(paste("Missing columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))))
  validation_passed <- FALSE
  cat("❌ **MISSING COLUMNS:**", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
} else {
  cat("✓ All expected columns present\n\n")
}

if (length(extra_cols) > 0) {
  cat("⚠️  **UNEXPECTED COLUMNS:**", paste(extra_cols, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
}
```

## Blank Cells

```{r check-blanks}
blank_issues <- data %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(.x == "", na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  select(where(~ .x > 0))

if (ncol(blank_issues) > 0) {
  validation_errors <- c(validation_errors,
                         list("Blank cells found (should be explicit NA)"))
  validation_passed <- FALSE
  cat("❌ **BLANK CELLS FOUND** (should be NA):\n\n")
  kable(blank_issues)
} else {
  cat("✓ No blank cells found\n\n")
}
```

## Required Fields

```{r check-required}
required_fields <- c(
  "data_source", "region", "farmer", "site", "subsite",
  "longitude", "latitude",
  "session_start_date", "session_end_date",
  "date", "survey_night", "trap_type",
  "number_traps_set", "number_functional_traps", "number_mice_caught"
)

na_counts <- data %>%
  select(all_of(required_fields[required_fields %in% names(data)])) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.x)))) %>%
  select(where(~ .x > 0))

if (ncol(na_counts) > 0) {
  validation_errors <- c(validation_errors,
                         list("Missing values in required fields"))
  validation_passed <- FALSE
  cat("❌ **MISSING VALUES IN REQUIRED FIELDS:**\n\n")
  kable(na_counts)
} else {
  cat("✓ All required fields have values\n\n")
}
```

## Coordinates

```{r check-coords}
## 1. Range checks
if ("longitude" %in% names(data)) {
  invalid_lon <- sum(data$longitude < 110 | data$longitude > 155, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (invalid_lon > 0) {
    validation_errors <- c(validation_errors, list("Invalid longitude values"))
    validation_passed <- FALSE
    cat("❌", invalid_lon, "longitude value(s) outside Australian range (110–155)\n\n")
  } else {
    cat("✓ Longitude values within Australian range (110–155)\n\n")
  }
}

if ("latitude" %in% names(data)) {
  invalid_lat <- sum(data$latitude < -45 | data$latitude > -10, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (invalid_lat > 0) {
    validation_errors <- c(validation_errors, list("Invalid latitude values"))
    validation_passed <- FALSE
    cat("❌", invalid_lat, "latitude value(s) outside Australian range (−45 to −10)\n\n")
  } else {
    cat("✓ Latitude values within Australian range (−45 to −10)\n\n")
  }
}

## 2. Swapped coordinate check
if (all(c("longitude", "latitude") %in% names(data))) {
  swapped <- with(data, (longitude < 0 | longitude < 90) & (latitude > 0 | latitude > 100))
  n_swapped <- sum(swapped, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (n_swapped > 0) {
    validation_errors <- c(validation_errors, list("Possibly swapped latitude and longitude"))
    validation_passed <- FALSE
    cat("❌", n_swapped, "record(s) where latitude and longitude may be swapped\n\n")
    kable(data[which(swapped), c("farmer", "site", "subsite", "region", "longitude", "latitude")],
          caption = "Possibly swapped coordinates")
  } else {
    cat("✓ No obviously swapped lat/lon detected\n\n")
  }
}

## 3. Spatial validation against Australian state boundaries
if (all(c("longitude", "latitude") %in% names(data))) {
  tryCatch({
    store_path <- if (dir.exists("_targets")) "_targets" else "../_targets"
    aus_shp    <- targets::tar_read(aus_shp, store = store_path)

    data_coords <- data[!is.na(data$longitude) & !is.na(data$latitude), ]
    data_sf     <- sf::st_as_sf(data_coords, coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)
    aus_boundary <- sf::st_union(aus_shp)

    within_aus <- as.vector(sf::st_within(data_sf, aus_boundary, sparse = FALSE))
    n_outside  <- sum(!within_aus)
    if (n_outside > 0) {
      validation_errors <- c(validation_errors, list("Point(s) fall outside Australia"))
      validation_passed <- FALSE
      cat("❌", n_outside, "point(s) fall outside Australian state boundaries\n\n")
      kable(data_coords[!within_aus, c("farmer", "site", "subsite", "region", "longitude", "latitude")],
            caption = "Records outside Australia")
    } else {
      cat("✓ All points fall within Australian state boundaries\n\n")
    }

  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("⚠️ Spatial validation could not be completed:", conditionMessage(e), "\n\n")
  })
}

## 4. Coordinate table for visual inspection
if (all(c("farmer", "site", "subsite", "region", "longitude", "latitude") %in% names(data))) {
  cat("\n**All site coordinates (for visual inspection):**\n\n")
  kable(
    distinct(data[, c("farmer", "site", "subsite", "region", "longitude", "latitude")]),
    caption = "Unique site coordinates"
  )
}
```

```{r map-coords}
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6

if (all(c("longitude", "latitude") %in% names(data)) &&
    any(!is.na(data$longitude) & !is.na(data$latitude))) {

  popup_text <- paste0(
    "<b>", data$farmer, " – ", data$site, "</b><br>",
    "Subsite: ", data$subsite, "<br>",
    "Region: ", data$region, "<br>",
    "Lon: ", round(data$longitude, 6), "  Lat: ", round(data$latitude, 6)
  )

  unique_regions <- unique(data$region)
  region_colors  <- rainbow(length(unique_regions))
  names(region_colors) <- unique_regions
  marker_colors <- region_colors[data$region]

  leaflet(data) |>
    addProviderTiles(provider = "Esri.WorldImagery", group = "Satellite") |>
    addProviderTiles(provider = "OpenStreetMap",     group = "Street Map") |>
    addCircleMarkers(
      lng         = ~longitude,
      lat         = ~latitude,
      popup       = popup_text,
      label       = ~paste(farmer, site, subsite, sep = " / "),
      color       = marker_colors,
      fillColor   = marker_colors,
      radius      = 8,
      fillOpacity = 0.8,
      stroke      = TRUE,
      weight      = 2
    ) |>
    addScaleBar(position = "bottomleft", options = scaleBarOptions(imperial = FALSE)) |>
    addLayersControl(
      baseGroups = c("Street Map", "Satellite"),
      options    = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
    ) |>
    addLegend(
      position = "bottomright",
      colors   = region_colors,
      labels   = names(region_colors),
      title    = "Region",
      opacity  = 0.8
    )
}
```

## Known Sites

```{r check-existing-sites}
# Check all sites in the file against data_site_information (the reference table
# built from all historical survey data). Flags sites that are not yet registered,
# as new sites should be added to the database before data are processed.

if (all(c("region", "farmer", "site", "subsite") %in% names(data))) {
  tryCatch({
    if (!is.null(params$site_info_path) && file.exists(params$site_info_path)) {
      site_info <- readRDS(params$site_info_path)
    } else {
      store_path <- if (dir.exists("_targets")) "_targets" else "../_targets"
      site_info  <- targets::tar_read(data_site_information, store = store_path)
    }

    file_key  <- tolower(trimws(paste(data$region,     data$farmer,     data$site,     data$subsite)))
    known_key <- tolower(trimws(paste(site_info$region, site_info$farmer, site_info$site, site_info$subsite)))

    unrecognised <- !file_key %in% known_key
    n_unrecognised <- sum(unrecognised)

    if (n_unrecognised > 0) {
      # warn but do not fail — new sites may have been added intentionally
      cat("⚠️", n_unrecognised,
          "record(s) have a region/farmer/site/subsite combination not found in the site database.",
          "If these are genuinely new sites this is expected on the first run after adding data.\n\n")
      kable(
        distinct(data[unrecognised, c("region", "farmer", "site", "subsite", "longitude", "latitude")]),
        caption = "Sites not found in site information database"
      )
    } else {
      cat("✓ All sites found in site information database\n\n")
    }

    ## For recognised sites, check coordinates are close to stored values
    recognised <- data[!unrecognised, ]
    if (nrow(recognised) > 0 && all(c("longitude", "latitude") %in% names(recognised))) {
      recognised_key <- tolower(trimws(paste(recognised$region, recognised$farmer,
                                             recognised$site,   recognised$subsite)))
      matched_info   <- site_info[match(recognised_key, known_key), ]

      lon_diff     <- abs(recognised$longitude - matched_info$longitude)
      lat_diff     <- abs(recognised$latitude  - matched_info$latitude)
      coord_changed <- (lon_diff > 0.05 | lat_diff > 0.05) & !is.na(lon_diff) & !is.na(lat_diff)

      if (any(coord_changed)) {
        cat("⚠️", sum(coord_changed),
            "site(s) have coordinates that differ from stored values by > 0.05°\n\n")
        kable(
          cbind(
            distinct(recognised[coord_changed, c("region", "farmer", "site", "subsite", "longitude", "latitude")]),
            stored_longitude = round(matched_info$longitude[coord_changed], 6),
            stored_latitude  = round(matched_info$latitude[coord_changed],  6)
          ),
          caption = "Sites with coordinates differing from stored values"
        )
      } else {
        cat("✓ Coordinates for all recognised sites are consistent with stored values\n\n")
      }
    }

  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("⚠️ Site check could not be completed:", conditionMessage(e), "\n\n")
  })
}
```

## Dates

```{r check-dates}
if (all(c("session_start_date", "session_end_date", "date") %in% names(data))) {

  ## 1. session_end_date must not be before session_start_date
  bad_session <- sum(data$session_end_date < data$session_start_date, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (bad_session > 0) {
    validation_errors <- c(validation_errors, list("session_end_date before session_start_date"))
    validation_passed <- FALSE
    cat("❌", bad_session, "record(s) where session_end_date is before session_start_date\n\n")
  } else {
    cat("✓ Session date ranges are logical (session_end_date ≥ session_start_date)\n\n")
  }

  ## 2. capture date must be within the session window
  date_outside_session <- sum(
    data$date < data$session_start_date | data$date > data$session_end_date,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
  if (date_outside_session > 0) {
    validation_errors <- c(validation_errors, list("Capture date(s) outside session window"))
    validation_passed <- FALSE
    cat("❌", date_outside_session,
        "record(s) where 'date' falls outside the session_start_date / session_end_date window\n\n")
    bad_rows <- data[
      !is.na(data$date) & (data$date < data$session_start_date | data$date > data$session_end_date),
      intersect(c("farmer", "site", "subsite", "session_start_date", "session_end_date", "date"), names(data))
    ]
    kable(bad_rows, caption = "Records with capture date outside session window")
  } else {
    cat("✓ All capture dates fall within their session window\n\n")
  }

  ## 3. Year outlier check — catches typos like 2025 in a 2026 file
  all_years    <- lubridate::year(c(data$session_start_date, data$session_end_date, data$date))
  all_years    <- all_years[!is.na(all_years)]
  if (length(all_years) > 0) {
    dominant_year    <- as.integer(names(sort(table(all_years), decreasing = TRUE)[1]))
    outlier_records  <- lubridate::year(data$date) != dominant_year & !is.na(data$date)
    if (any(outlier_records)) {
      validation_errors <- c(validation_errors,
        list(paste0(sum(outlier_records), " record(s) with a year different from dominant year (", dominant_year, ")")))
      validation_passed <- FALSE
      cat("❌", sum(outlier_records),
          "record(s) with a year different from the dominant year (", dominant_year, ")\n\n")
      kable(data[outlier_records,
                 intersect(c("farmer", "site", "subsite", "session_start_date", "session_end_date", "date"), names(data))],
            caption = paste("Records with year ≠", dominant_year))
    } else {
      cat("✓ All date years are consistent with the dominant year (", dominant_year, ")\n\n")
    }
  }
}
```

## Trap Counts

```{r check-trap-counts}
## 1. Non-negative counts
count_cols <- c("number_traps_set", "number_phantoms", "number_functional_traps", "number_mice_caught")
count_cols <- count_cols[count_cols %in% names(data)]

negative_counts <- data %>%
  select(all_of(count_cols)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(.x < 0, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  select(where(~ .x > 0))

if (ncol(negative_counts) > 0) {
  validation_errors <- c(validation_errors, list("Negative trap count values"))
  validation_passed <- FALSE
  cat("❌ **NEGATIVE VALUES IN TRAP COUNTS:**\n\n")
  kable(negative_counts)
} else {
  cat("✓ All trap count values are ≥ 0\n\n")
}

## 2. functional traps = set − phantoms
if (all(c("number_traps_set", "number_phantoms", "number_functional_traps") %in% names(data))) {
  expected_functional <- data$number_traps_set - data$number_phantoms
  mismatch <- sum(data$number_functional_traps != expected_functional, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (mismatch > 0) {
    validation_errors <- c(validation_errors,
      list(paste(mismatch, "record(s) where number_functional_traps ≠ number_traps_set − number_phantoms")))
    validation_passed <- FALSE
    cat("❌", mismatch,
        "record(s) where number_functional_traps does not equal number_traps_set − number_phantoms\n\n")
    bad <- which(data$number_functional_traps != expected_functional)
    kable(data[bad, c("farmer", "site", "subsite", "date",
                      "number_traps_set", "number_phantoms", "number_functional_traps")],
          caption = "Trap count inconsistencies")
  } else {
    cat("✓ number_functional_traps = number_traps_set − number_phantoms for all records\n\n")
  }
}

## 3. mice caught cannot exceed functional traps
if (all(c("number_mice_caught", "number_functional_traps") %in% names(data))) {
  overcatch <- sum(data$number_mice_caught > data$number_functional_traps, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (overcatch > 0) {
    validation_errors <- c(validation_errors,
      list(paste(overcatch, "record(s) where number_mice_caught > number_functional_traps")))
    validation_passed <- FALSE
    cat("❌", overcatch, "record(s) where number_mice_caught exceeds number_functional_traps\n\n")
    bad <- which(data$number_mice_caught > data$number_functional_traps)
    kable(data[bad, c("farmer", "site", "subsite", "date",
                      "number_functional_traps", "number_mice_caught")],
          caption = "Records where catches exceed functional trap count")
  } else {
    cat("✓ number_mice_caught ≤ number_functional_traps for all records\n\n")
  }
}
```

## Ground Cover & Biomass

```{r check-ground-cover-biomass}
if ("ground_cover_percent" %in% names(data)) {
  invalid_gc <- sum(data$ground_cover_percent < 0 | data$ground_cover_percent > 100, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (invalid_gc > 0) {
    validation_errors <- c(validation_errors, list("Invalid ground cover percentages"))
    validation_passed <- FALSE
    cat("❌", invalid_gc, "ground_cover_percent value(s) outside 0–100 range\n\n")
  } else {
    cat("✓ Ground cover percentage values valid\n\n")
  }
}

if ("biomass" %in% names(data)) {
  valid_biomass   <- c("low", "medium", "high", NA)
  invalid_biomass <- sum(!tolower(data$biomass) %in% valid_biomass, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (invalid_biomass > 0) {
    validation_errors <- c(validation_errors, list("Invalid biomass values"))
    validation_passed <- FALSE
    cat("❌", invalid_biomass, "biomass value(s) not in (low, medium, high)\n\n")
    cat("Unique values found:", paste(unique(data$biomass), collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
  } else {
    cat("✓ Biomass values valid\n\n")
  }
}
```

## Data Types

```{r check-types}
type_mismatches <- data.frame(
  column   = character(),
  expected = character(),
  actual   = character(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (col in names(expected_classes)) {
  if (col %in% names(data)) {
    actual_class <- class(data[[col]])[1]
    exp_class    <- expected_classes[[col]]
    all_na <- all(is.na(data[[col]]))
    ok <- actual_class == exp_class ||
          (exp_class == "numeric" && actual_class == "integer") ||
          (exp_class == "numeric" && actual_class == "logical" && all_na)
    if (!ok) {
      type_mismatches <- rbind(type_mismatches, data.frame(
        column   = col,
        expected = exp_class,
        actual   = actual_class,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

if (nrow(type_mismatches) > 0) {
  validation_errors <- c(validation_errors, list("Column(s) have incorrect data type"))
  validation_passed <- FALSE
  cat("❌ Column type mismatches found:\n\n")
  kable(type_mismatches, col.names = c("Column", "Expected class", "Actual class"))
} else {
  cat("✓ All columns have the correct data type\n\n")
}
```

---

```{r halt-if-errors}
if (!validation_passed) {
  cat("\n\n# ⚠️ VALIDATION FAILED\n\n")
  cat("**The following errors were found:**\n\n")
  for (i in seq_along(validation_errors)) {
    cat(i, ". ", validation_errors[[i]], "\n", sep = "")
  }
  cat("\n\n**Please correct these issues before proceeding.**\n\n")
  knitr::knit_exit()
}
```

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## Validation Status
✅ **All validation checks passed!** Proceeding with summary.
:::

---

# Data Summary

```{r summary-survey}
cat("## Survey Details\n\n")
cat("- **Data source(s):** ", paste(unique(data$data_source), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("- **Region(s):** ",      paste(unique(data$region),      collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("- **Farmer(s):** ",      paste(unique(data$farmer),      collapse = ", "), "\n")
```

```{r summary-sites}
cat("\n## Site Information\n\n")
cat("- **Total records:** ",    nrow(data), "\n")
cat("- **Unique sites:** ",     length(unique(paste(data$farmer, data$site))),          "\n")
cat("- **Unique subsites:** ",  length(unique(paste(data$farmer, data$site, data$subsite))), "\n")
```

```{r summary-session}
cat("\n## Session\n\n")
if (all(c("session_start_date", "session_end_date") %in% names(data))) {
  cat("- **Session start:** ", format(min(data$session_start_date, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")
  cat("- **Session end:** ",   format(max(data$session_end_date,   na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")
  session_length <- as.numeric(max(data$session_end_date, na.rm = TRUE) -
                                  min(data$session_start_date, na.rm = TRUE)) + 1
  cat("- **Session length (days):** ", session_length, "\n")
}
if ("survey_night" %in% names(data)) {
  cat("- **Survey nights:** ", paste(sort(unique(data$survey_night)), collapse = ", "), "\n")
}
if ("trap_type" %in% names(data)) {
  cat("- **Trap type(s):** ", paste(unique(data$trap_type), collapse = ", "), "\n")
}
```

```{r summary-captures}
cat("\n## Captures\n\n")

# number_functional_traps is a session-level value repeated across all individual
# rows for the same subsite x date x survey_night x trap_type. Deduplicate before
# summing to avoid inflating the trap-night count.
if ("number_functional_traps" %in% names(data)) {
  total_trap_nights <- data |>
    dplyr::distinct(farmer, site, subsite, date, survey_night, trap_type, number_functional_traps) |>
    dplyr::summarise(total = sum(number_functional_traps, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
    dplyr::pull(total)
  cat("- **Total functional trap-nights:** ", total_trap_nights, "\n")
}

# Total captures: individual rows that represent a real animal (class is not NA
# and not "phantom" — phantom rows record traps that were sprung with no animal).
if ("class" %in% names(data)) {
  total_captures <- data |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(class), tolower(trimws(class)) != "phantom") |>
    nrow()
  cat("- **Total captures (all animals including recaptures):** ", total_captures, "\n")

  # Unique individuals: first captures only, excluding recaptures and phantoms.
  unique_individuals <- data |>
    dplyr::filter(tolower(trimws(class)) == "first_capture") |>
    nrow()
  cat("- **Unique individuals (first captures only):** ", unique_individuals, "\n")

  if (exists("total_trap_nights") && total_trap_nights > 0) {
    trap_success <- round(total_captures / total_trap_nights * 100, 2)
    cat("- **Overall trap success — % trap-nights catching an animal:** ", trap_success, "\n")
  }
}
```

```{r summary-crop}
cat("\n## Crop Information\n\n")
if ("crop_type"  %in% names(data)) cat("- **Crop type(s):**  ", paste(unique(data$crop_type),  collapse = ", "), "\n")
if ("crop_stage" %in% names(data)) cat("- **Crop stage(s):** ", paste(unique(data$crop_stage), collapse = ", "), "\n")
```
